features: Triple Pack Value – Includes 3 carpet deodorisers in two refreshing fragrances: Super Fresh and Fresh Pink.
Powerful Odour Neutraliser – Neutradol’s proven formula destroys odour molecules instead of simply masking them.
Fresh & Long-Lasting Fragrance – Leaves carpets, rugs, and rooms smelling clean and inviting.
Quick & Easy to Use – Sprinkle evenly, leave for a few minutes, then vacuum for instant freshness.
Ideal for Everyday Odours – Perfect for tackling smells from pets, smoke, cooking, and daily living.
description: Product description Give your home lasting freshness with the Neutradol Carpet Deodoriser 3 Pack, featuring the uplifting Super Fresh and Fresh Pink fragrances. Designed to eliminate tough odours trapped in carpets, rugs, and upholstery, this powerful formula goes beyond masking smells – it destroys odour molecules for real results. Whether you’re dealing with pet odours, cooking smells, smoke, or general mustiness, Neutradol’s trusted technology restores freshness and leaves your home smelling clean and welcoming. Using it is simple: just sprinkle over carpeted areas, allow it to work for a few minutes, then vacuum away. The result? Revitalised carpets and a fresher home environment. With three bottles in one convenient value pack, you’ll have long-lasting protection and variety in fragrances, making it ideal for busy households, pet owners, and families. Ingredients Powder Directions Sprinkle evenly over carpeted areas, allow to work for a few minutes, then vacuum away. See more
